## Change

Describe the behavior and operational impact.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] Production build passes
- [ ] Deployment or migration impact is documented

## Dependency Evidence

Complete this section when dependencies, lockfiles, images, or Actions change.

- [ ] Release notes and advisory impact reviewed
- [ ] `npm run supply-chain:check` and `npm run security:audit` pass
- [ ] SBOM generated and lockfile provenance reviewed
- [ ] Rollback commit/image and database compatibility recorded
